scripts.android:dev: sh -c 'if ! adb devices | grep -q "emulator\|device$" || [ $(adb devices | grep -c -E "emulator|device$") -eq 0 ]; then AVD=$("$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator" -list-avds | head -1) && "$HOME/Library/Android/sdk/emulator/emulator" -avd "$AVD" &disown && echo "Waiting for emulator to boot..." && adb wait-for-device && adb shell "while [[ \"$(getprop sys.boot_completed)\" != \"1\" ]]; do sleep 1; done" && echo "Emulator ready."; fi' && tauri android build --apk && (adb install -r src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release.apk || (adb uninstall com.arktosmos.mhaoltube && adb install src-tauri/gen/android/app/build/outputs/apk/universal/release/app-universal-release.apk)) && adb shell am start -n com.arktosmos.mhaoltube/.MainActivity
